programme.title: Titoo Topper-Titoo
programme.desc: When Golu claims that Titoo is the topper in class, he is forced to prove him right. S01 E20.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Gandhigiri-Titoo
programme.desc: After an estate agent attempts to swindle Mittel Sahab's house, Titoo tries to expose him. S05E17.

programme.title: Judo Karate Vs Kickboxing-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera and Titoo use martial arts to track down the thief who robbed Shera's mother. S05E18.

programme.title: Walking Into Trouble-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean, a fastidious bachelor, finds unconventional ways to do seemingly normal tasks. S04E42.

programme.title: Beans Baby-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean, a fastidious bachelor, finds unconventional ways to do seemingly normal tasks. S04E43.

programme.title: Hiding At Home-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean, a fastidious bachelor, finds unconventional ways to do seemingly normal tasks. S04E44.

programme.title: Camping-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean reminisces about a camping trip and tries to recreate it. S01E17.

programme.title: Chocks Away-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean seeks revenge after Bruiser Jr damages his toy aeroplane. S01E18.

programme.title: Royal Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean's mug quest leads to royal chaos and an unexpected reward. S01E19.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E46.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E47.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E48.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E49.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E50.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E51.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E52.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E53.

programme.title: Burger-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo comes up with a plan to get free burgers but gets filled with gas when he eats too much. S01 E01.

programme.title: Time Table-Titoo
programme.desc: When Titoo is constantly playing nstead of studying, his parents put him on a timetable. S01 E02.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Sacchi Wish-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's father tells him that if you make a wish with all your heart, it will come true. S01E03.

programme.title: Sunday Is Funday-Titoo
programme.desc: When they are left home alone on a Sunday, Titoo and Golu decide to clean the house. S01 E04.

programme.title: Liar Liar-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo makes a promise to his mother to never lie and to only tell the truth at all times. S01E05.

programme.title: Titoo For Tat-Titoo
programme.desc: When Shera makes Rinky-Pinky on her birthday, Titoo decides to teach him a lesson. S01E06.

programme.title: Titoo Ke Tedhe Sawaal-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's parents tells him to ask before doing anything but soon get annoyed with his many questions. S01 E07.

programme.title: Geela Home Work-Titoo
programme.desc: When Shera throws water on his homework, Titoo tells Shera's father and gets him punished. S01 E08.

programme.title: Miniature Titoo-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programme.title: Mummys TV Time-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo comes up with a plan to make his mother stop watching soap operas. S01E09.

programme.title: Golu Boy-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera spikes Golu's drink to make him lose his voice before the singing competition. S01 E10.

programme.title: Kite Festival-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and his friends participate in a kite competition but things take a turn in the end. S01E11.

programme.title: Holi Challenge, The-Titoo
programme.desc: During Holi, Shera is challenged to a spirited watercolour competition by Titoo. S01E12.

programme.title: Titoo Ka Tuition-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo discovers the teacher's inadequacy and resolves to rectify the situation himself. S01.

programme.title: Building Mein Bhoot-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo convinces people that a building is haunted to keep a cat and its family safe. S01E14.

programme.title: Mangal Ko Dangal-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera tries to use his cousin to trouble Titoo and his brother. S01E15.

programme.title: Bahana Expert Titoo-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo fakes being ill in order to go to a movie premiere instead of school. S01E16.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: Based on Choocha's dream, Hunny believes that Choocha will be able to foresee the future. S01 E13.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: Panditji convinces Billu to open his shop in the school after he bans Honey and Choocha. S01 E14.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice. S01E19.
